# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We currently provide security updates for the following versions of matrix-cli:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| main    | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub Issues.

To report a vulnerability, navigate to the **Security** tab of this repository, select **Advisories**, and click the **Report a vulnerability** button. We will review your report in a private workspace and respond as soon as possible.
